ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., Logistic Regression, K-NN) */,
  "algorithm_description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the algorithm (e.g., learning rate, number of layers) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Avro) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used to train the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used to train the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model in seconds */,
  "training_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the training set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "true_negative" INTEGER /* Number of true negative predictions */,
  "false_negative" INTEGER /* Number of false negative predictions */,
  "false_positive" INTEGER /* Number of false positive predictions */,
  "true_positive" INTEGER /* Number of true positive predictions */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_algorithms" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, use) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., trained, tested) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_algorithms_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_algorithms_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_datasets" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, use) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., uploaded, downloaded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_models" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, use) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., trained, tested) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_version_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "true_negative" INTEGER /* Number of true negative predictions */,
  "false_negative" INTEGER /* Number of false negative predictions */,
  "false_positive" INTEGER /* Number of false positive predictions */,
  "true_positive" INTEGER /* Number of true positive predictions */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model version */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model version */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model version */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_model_versions" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model version */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, use) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., trained, tested) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_version_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., size, quality) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_version_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., model sharing, dataset sharing) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
